title: Batch Release
description: Batch Release v1 contract. Batch RELEASED is a separate decision after QC; QC_PASS cannot auto-release a batch.
$comment: Sources: PACK-01/TECH-03 QC_PASS vs RELEASED boundary and appendix OPF-10 finished goods QC / OPF-11 warehouse receipt order.

qc_inspection_id.description: Finished product QC inspection used for release decision.

qc_status.description: QC status used for release review.

warehouse_receipt_allowed.description: True only when release permits warehouse receipt.
